summary: Sprint 56 GOVERNANÇA OPERACIONAL fully validated. Backend pytest 13/13 PASS on new suite. Operador end-to-end wizard (Solicitar Serviço) works — creates OS #2026-00039 with status=solicitada, origem=operador, justificativa persisted. PCM flow: create melhoria → aprovacao.necessaria=true (auto from org_config.workflow.tipos_que_precisam_aprovacao) → POST /enviar-aprovacao → status=aguardando_aprovacao. Approval endpoint POST /aprovar tested with all 3 decisões: aprovada→programada, rejeitada→cancelada, revisao→em_analise. Free-string tipo accepted (tested with tipo=meu_tipo_custom). Estatísticas endpoint returns por_origem, por_tipo, por_disciplina, aguardando_aprovacao, aguardando_material as required. StatusBadge renders all 11 new statuses correctly (visually confirmed in /os Lista). Sidebar: Operador shows 'Solicitar Serviço' only (no Anomalias/OS) — CORRECT per spec. PCM shows OS + Anomalias — CORRECT. OS detail page shows Justificativa da Solicitação section for solicitada OS and Aprovação Gerencial panel for aguardando_aprovacao OS. Backward compat verified — OS status='aberta'/'planejada' still render.

ui_bugs.issue: Kanban view only has columns [Abertas, Planejadas, Em Execução, Pausadas, Concluídas]. New Sprint 56 statuses (solicitada, em_analise, aguardando_aprovacao, aguardando_material, disponivel, encerrada, cancelada) have NO Kanban column, so those OSs are invisible unless user switches to Lista mode. Consider adding columns or mapping new statuses to existing lanes.

Spec says 'Gerente sees Dashboard, Ordens de Serviço, Ativos, Auditoria only'. Current code always renders PRINCIPAL (Central de Trabalho + Dashboard + Equipe), OPERAÇÃO (Ativos + OS + Inspeções + Anomalias), INFRAESTRUTURA (Áreas), MATERIAIS (Estoque + Sobressalentes + Paradas) groups for non-operacional roles, THEN adds GESTÃO block for gerente on top. Result: gerente sees ~13 items instead of 4. Fix: gate the base groups on `!isGerente` too, or build gerente as an exclusive menu branch.

Backend /api/ordens-servico/estatisticas now returns por_origem and aguardando_aprovacao counts, but the dashboard KPI cards do NOT render them. Only Backlog / OS Abertas / Ordens Críticas are shown. Sprint spec item 8 requires 'Dashboard shows por_origem and aguardando_aprovacao counts'.

issues: Aprovação Gerencial panel is rendered inside the same white glass-card as Rastreabilidade; giving it its own titled card would improve scannability.
'Revisão' button uses window.prompt() for observation input — consider a proper modal for consistency with rest of UI (toast + shadcn Dialog).

action_items: MEDIUM: Add Kanban columns for new statuses (solicitada, em_analise, aguardando_aprovacao, aguardando_material, disponivel) or map them into existing lanes so PCM/Supervisor sees them without switching to Lista.

MEDIUM: Fix Gerente sidebar — currently shows ~13 items across PRINCIPAL/OPERAÇÃO/INFRAESTRUTURA/MATERIAIS + GESTÃO. Spec wants only 4 items. Gate base groups with `!isGerente` OR make gerente an exclusive menu branch.
MEDIUM: Add 'Aguardando Aprovação' + 'Por Origem' KPI cards on Dashboard (data already returned by GET /api/ordens-servico/estatisticas).
LOW: Replace window.prompt() in aprovar/rejeitar/revisao actions with a proper modal (Dialog + Textarea).
LOW: Seed a test.gerente@maintrix.com account so E2E approval flow with role=gerente can be exercised end-to-end. Currently /aprovar was validated via master role (has admin rights).
critical_code_review_comments: work_orders.py:317 update_os_status (PATCH /ordens-servico/{id}/status) still uses hardcoded valid list ['aberta','planejada','em_execucao','pausada'] — this Kanban endpoint will 400 for any of the new statuses. Update valid list to match Sprint 56 statuses.

work_orders.py:184 create_os — status_inicial for role=='supervisor' reads data.status which is not a field on OSCreate model. That branch is dead code (hasattr always True on Pydantic but data.status will be None). Consider adding `status: Optional[str]` to OSCreate or removing the branch.

work_orders.py:534 aprovar_os — permission list is ['admin','master','gerente'] which is correct, but there's no check that OS is in status='aguardando_aprovacao' before approving. A gerente could approve an OS that was never sent to approval, causing state confusion.

models.py:34 OSStatus enum still includes ABERTA and PLANEJADA as 'backward compat aliases' — good for reading old records; but new writes should never use those. Consider adding validator to block new OS from being created with status=aberta/planejada.
App.js:4014 — approve/reject/revisao uses window.prompt() which is not accessible / not styled and breaks on some mobile browsers.

success_rate.backend: 100% (13/13 pytest — operador flow, pcm approval flow with all 3 decisões, invalid decisao rejected, estatisticas shape, filter by origem, filter by status=solicitada, free-string tipo accepted)
success_rate.frontend: 90% — Operador wizard, PCM sidebar, OS list Lista mode with new status badges, OS detail justificativa + aprovacao panel all working. Kanban and Dashboard do not surface new statuses (gap, not blocker).

test_credentials: test.operador@maintrix.com/op123 (verified), test.pcm@maintrix.com/pcm123 (verified), master@maintrix.com/master123 (used as approver since no gerente user). Org: ASTEC Cedro (must be selected before login form). Ativo used: 5af42d90-4654-4067-b67d-92d7e7f6f78d (AV-01 ALIMENTADOR).
seed_data_creation: Created ~8 TEST_SP56_* OSs via API + 1 TEST_UI Vazamento eixo via operador UI wizard. All prefixed TEST_. No cleanup performed — they are non-destructive and marked TEST_.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 56 backend + frontend flows are stable. Three medium follow-up items remain (Kanban columns, Gerente sidebar, Dashboard KPIs) — none block the sprint. Also flagged: PATCH /ordens-servico/{id}/status (kanban drag-drop) has stale hardcoded valid statuses that will reject the new statuses; and approve endpoint doesn't verify current status is aguardando_aprovacao. Test credentials require ASTEC Cedro org selection FIRST, then login form. No gerente test user exists — approval endpoint was validated using master role which is accepted by check_write_permission(['admin','master','gerente']).
rca_of_the_issue: Not applicable — no bugs blocking Sprint 56 acceptance. Findings are enhancement/completeness gaps: (1) Kanban lanes are hardcoded in the OSPage component to the legacy 5-status model; adding the new statuses requires updating the group definition + the drag-drop PATCH validator. (2) Gerente sidebar leak occurs because the menuGroups array unconditionally emits PRINCIPAL/OPERAÇÃO/INFRAESTRUTURA/MATERIAIS to any non-operacional role; the fix is one gate expression. (3) Dashboard cards are declarative in a KPI grid — adding 2 new cards from existing stats endpoint is a small addition.
